trans-unit.source: "Accessible Books" are books that work well for people with impaired vision. With the ePUB format*, it is possible to make "Born Accessible" books that work well for everyone**, regardless of vision. Bloom has the following tools to help you create these books:
trans-unit.target: "∆ŹlveriŇüli Kitablar", g√∂rm…ô qabiliyy…ôti pozulmuŇü insanlar √ľ√ß√ľn yaxŇüńĪ iŇül…ôy…ôn kitablardńĪr. Epub formatńĪnda *, g√∂rm…ô baxńĪmńĪndan asńĪlńĪ olmayaraq h…ôr k…ôs √ľ√ß√ľn yaxŇüńĪ iŇül…ôy…ôn "∆ŹlveriŇüli Dońüan" kitablarńĪ etm…ôk m√ľmk√ľnd√ľr. Bloom bu kitablarńĪ yaratmaq √ľ√ß√ľn aŇüańüńĪdakńĪ vasit…ôl…ôr…ô malikdir:

trans-unit.source: This tool, the Accessibility Checker, has:
trans-unit.target: Bu al…ôt, "∆ŹlveriŇülilik YoxlayńĪcńĪ" aŇüańüńĪda x√ľssiyy…ôtl…ôr malikdir:

trans-unit.source: The "Accessibility Checklist" which is where Bloom checks over your book and points you to anything that needs attention, especially for speakers of minority languages.
trans-unit.target: ∆ŹlveriŇülilik SiyahasńĪ - burda Bloom sizin KitabńĪnńĪz yoxlayaraq v…ô h…ôr diqq…ôtiniz lazńĪm olan (x√ľssus il…ô) Ňüeyl…ôr g√∂sterir.

trans-unit.source: The "Ace by DAISY Checker" searches the actual ePUB generated by Bloom looking for any problems.
trans-unit.target: "DAISY t…ôr…ôfind…ôn Eys YoxlayńĪcńĪ" Bloom t…ôr…ôfind…ôn yaradan faktiki ePUB-da yoxlayaraq h…ôr hansńĪ bir m…ôs…ôl…ô √ľ√ß√ľn axtarńĪr.

trans-unit.source: While the ideal is that a single book can serve everyone, the ePUB standard and ePUB readers do not actually support that. They currently only work for blind people who speak a language that is supported by "Text to Speech" (TTS) systems. At this time, TTS is only available for large or commercially interesting languages. Until the standard and accessible readers improve, it is necessary to make special versions of accessible books for minority language speakers. For blind readers to hear the image descriptions, we need to put something special on the page. In this version of Bloom, you do this by clicking the "Include image descriptions on page" checkbox in the Publish:ePUB screen. Future versions may have other options in this area.
trans-unit.target: ńįdeal bir kitabńĪn h…ôr k…ôs…ô xidm…ôt ed…ô bil…ôc…ôyi olsa da, ePUB standartńĪ v…ô ePUB oxucularńĪ bunu …ôslind…ô d…ôst…ôkl…ômirl…ôr. Hal-hazńĪrda onlar yalnńĪz "M…ôtnd…ôn nitq…ô" (TTS) sisteml…ôri t…ôr…ôfind…ôn d…ôst…ôkl…ôn…ôn bir dild…ô danńĪŇüan kor insanlar √ľ√ß√ľn iŇül…ôyirl…ôr. ńįndiki zamanda TTS yalnńĪz b√∂y√ľk v…ô ya kommersiya c…ôh…ôtd…ôn maraqlńĪ dill…ôr √ľ√ß√ľn m√∂vcuddur. Standart v…ô …ôl√ßatan oxucu cihazlar yaxŇüńĪlaŇüana q…ôd…ôr az saylńĪ xalqlarńĪn dill…ôr √ľ√ß√ľn …ôl√ßatan kitablarńĪn x√ľsusi versiyalarńĪnńĪn hazńĪrlanmasńĪ lazńĪmdńĪr. Kor oxuculara t…ôsvirl…ôri eŇüitm…ôk √ľ√ß√ľn, s…ôhif…ôy…ô x√ľsusi bir Ňüey …ôlav…ô etm…ôliyik. Bloom'un bu versiyasńĪnda n…ôŇür etm…ôk: ePUB ekranńĪnda "Ňě…ôkil t…ôsvirl…ôrini s…ôhif…ôd…ô daxil et" onay qutusuna tńĪklayarak bunu ed…ô bil…ôrsiniz. G…ôl…ôc…ôk versiyalarda bu sah…ôd…ô dig…ôr variantlar ola bil…ôr.

trans-unit.note: This is shown at the bottom of a dialog box. It is paired with an action button like "OK" and it means "do not do the action". In English, this is the same as "Common.CancelProcess", but could be different in your language.
This is identical to Common.Cancel. The duplication was introduced by a mistake.
This is shown at the bottom of a dialog box. It is paired with an action button like "OK" and it means "do not do the action".

If you include "&" (which represents an ampersand) in your translation, it will not be visible in Bloom. Instead, the letter following it will be a keyboard shortcut (e.g., &Cancel means that alt-C can be used to activate the Cancel button.) The letter marked with ampersand is usually the first one but does not have to be. It is important not to mark the same letter in two different controls in the same dialog. If you are not sure, just don't include the "amp;"; the only consequence is that this control cannot be activated using an alt-key shortcut.
This is shown at the bottom of a dialog box and means to go ahead with some action. It is often paired with "Cancel"

trans-unit.source:
The file you‚Äôve chosen is a ‚ÄúJPEG‚ÄĚ file. JPEG files are perfect for photographs and color artwork. However, JPEG files are a big problem for black and white line art. Problems include:
‚ÄĘ Fuzziness and grey dots.
‚ÄĘ Large file sizes, making the book hard to share.
‚ÄĘ If there are many large JPEGs, Bloom may not have enough memory to make PDF files.

Note: Because JPEG is ‚Äúlossy‚ÄĚ, converting a JPEG to PNG, TIFF, or BMP actually makes things even worse. If this is black and white line art, you want to get an original scan in one of those formats.

Please select from one of the following, then click ‚ÄúOK‚ÄĚ:

trans-unit.source: Bloom cannot start properly, and this symptom has been observed on machines with ZoneAlarm installed. Note: disabling ZoneAlarm does not help. Nor does restarting with it turned off. Something about the installation of ZoneAlarm causes the problem, and so far only uninstalling ZoneAlarm has been shown to fix the problem.
trans-unit.target: Bloom cannot start properly, and this symptom has been observed on machines with ZoneAlarm installed. Note: disabling ZoneAlarm does not help. Nor does restarting with it turned off. Something about the installation of ZoneAlarm causes the problem, and so far only uninstalling ZoneAlarm has been shown to fix the problem.
